nasb.text: The end of all things is near; therefore, be of sound judgment and sober spirit for the purpose of prayer.

esv.text: The end of all things is at hand; therefore be self-controlled and sober-minded for the sake of your prayers.

cnv.text: 萬物的結局近了，所以你們要謹慎警醒地禱告。

ccb.text: 万物的尽头快到了。因此，你们要谨慎自律，警醒祷告。

csbs.text: 万物的结局临近了，所以你们为了祷告的缘故应当清醒、谨慎。
